## Quality Check

- [ ] Root cause feels irreducible
- [ ] Every terminal why cited (or flagged as unvalidated)
- [ ] Job executor is a person, not an organization
- [ ] Problem statement is solution-agnostic
- [ ] Problem statement validated with 3 cited sources
- [ ] Every execution barrier maps to a specific failure point
- [ ] Unmet metrics are measurable
- [ ] Unmet metrics cite at least one source (Level 1 precision)
- [ ] Assumptions stated explicitly
